authority: retail ASM > oracle > decomp C; #else bodies lie (CHARTER rule 1)

entries.note: Re-derived jpt_80053F24 (weapon-func) + jpt_80054084 (shooting, idx=weapon_id-2, dispatch gun.c:20144-20154) from ASM. Known fixes confirmed present in C (M16/FNP90->machinegun, TANKSHELLS->pistol, TRIGGER->pistol == ASM). Residual divergence: ROCKETLAUNCH/REMOTEMINE/PLASTIQUE shooting groups differ from ASM -> FID-0051.

jpt_weapon_bullet_type[weapon_id-4] bounds<0x14. pistol handler=sub_GAME_7F061BF4+field_0x30++ then common tail; shotgun_mine=tail only; none=sub_GAME_7F061BF4 only. ASM maps SHOTGUN+AUTOSHOT->shotgun_mine but C switch(item) puts AUTOSHOT in pistol case -> FID-0052. SHOTGUN/LASER/WATCHLASER match.

Both dispatch tables map index-for-index onto the two live-C switch(phead->type) passes. jpt_object_type_expansion (prop.c:4638): idx=type-1 (addiu $t0,$v1,-1 prop.c:5252), bounds<0x2f (sltiu prop.c:5254), = C first-pass switch prop.c:3299; obj_03_expand repeats for the PROP/ALARM/MAGAZINE/... default-obj group matching C fall-through prop.c:3365. jpt_8004F02C (prop.c:4692): idx=type-3 (prop.c:5796), bounds<0x2d, = C second-pass reparent switch prop.c:3567 (12-case INSIDEANOTHEROBJ group matches). Maximally reachable (per-stage loader, every level load). NATIVE_PORT-only endian converters preceding dispatch have no ASM counterpart (out of scope).

jpt_80052C6C = 16-entry microcode opcode table (command00..0F). Dispatch chrobjhandler.c:29057-29063 idx=opcode bounds<0x10 else default. Live C switch(temp_t3) (chrobjhandler.c:28529) has cases 0..15 in 1:1 opcode order + default; dispatch structure/bounds equivalent.

Solo Bond viewer body/head model selection. jpt_bondcuff[bondtype] (bondview.c:3499) -> sp+0x44 body, bound sltiu $v1,9 (bondview.c:3588), v1=player->0x41c; jpt_bondhead[bondtype] (bondview.c:3512) -> sp+0x40 head, entered only when folderBond==0. All 9 cuff indices (CUFF_BLUE..FOLDER) and 9 head indices match live C nested switch (bondview.c:3081, body switch 3153, head switch 3183) incl defaults body=23/head=75. folderBond!=0 -> head=78 (BOND_CONNERY/DALTON/MOORE) matches ASM 3652. moore/dalton handler labels name-swapped vs enum but write identical values (body5/head78) => no behavior diff. Reachable every solo model load. NATIVE_PORT buffer-packing divergences (R1/red-shard fixes, commit 50f3f61) are landed fidelity fixes, not dispatch, out of scope.

jpt_mpspawntype[type] (7 entries), dispatch bondview.c:20201-20210 idx=type bounds<7, loop while(type!=9). All 8 per-case pointer strides match C switch(type) (gun-style intro cmd interp): 0=+0xC,1=+0x10,2=+0x10,3=+0x20,4=+0x8,5=+0x8,6=+0x28,default=+0x4. Full function traced.

MP respawn/intro setup-cmd interpreter. jpt_mpspawntype (7 entries, bondview.c:20301) dispatch: type=cmd[0], exit type==9 (beq $v0,9 bondview.c:20502), bounds sltiu $at,$v0,7 (bondview.c:20503) -> idx>=7 = mp_spawntype_default. All 8 per-type pointer strides match live C switch (bondview.c:19863, NONMATCHING): 0=+0xC,1=+0x10,2=+0x10,3=+0x20,4=+0x8,5=+0x8,6=+0x28,default=+0x4. Handler bodies (type1 give-inv, type2 give-ammo w/ check_ramrom_flags==cmd[3]) match C 19948-19960. Reachable every MP respawn w/ g_CurrentSetup.intro!=NULL. FLAGGED (not filed): retail .late_rodata scale divisors read 0.2004/0.1188 vs C 0.17/0.1, but the LEFTOVERDEBUG copy of the same fn agrees w/ C at 0.17/0.1 + label/reloc mismatch => likely dump artifact; needs ROM byte check to resolve.

Watch controller-page 3D joypad renderer, ASM 16597-17568 vs C 16183-16607. THREE divergences: (1) held-button depress -10.0 applied to the D_80035D44 pos block (arg0 of sub_GAME_7F06351C, PRE-rotation; e.g. i==4 swc1 sp+0x194 @17047-17049, same shape all 7 cases i=1,4,5,6,7,8,9) while C adds to the vertices-derived rotN (arg4, POST-rotation, C 16424-16426 etc) -> button travel direction/depth differs under the -pi/3 X rot; (2) retail loads ITEM_JOYPAD into hand 0 GUNRIGHT (move $a0,$zero; li $a1,85 @16687-16689 + all hand queries a0=0) vs C GUNLEFT throughout; (3) phantom per-frame save/restore of prev_watchmenu_item (C 16256/16601-16606) with no ASM counterpart. All 12 case masks/consts/else-if chains + subdraw + f32->s32 loops otherwise equivalent. See FID-0072.

Muzzle-flash/laser-beam/star-flare billboard DL builder. Live C NONMATCHING gun.c:12602-12946 = ASM gun.c:12973-13812 (US glabel 12973). Re-verified: random laser color path %50+0x96 into cn[3], %5==0 gate (bnezl), %100 then 255-r into cn[1]/cn[0] (ASM 13048-13068) = C:12661-12667, same RNG ordering; laser endpoint x<2.0 strict half-scale (c.lt.s f16,2.0 ASM 13375=gun.c:13373) = C:12784; star scale pick dist_sq2<dist_sq1 (ASM 13585) = C:12856; item_id lb sign-ext re-read, width<<5, all Gfx immediates match. Renderer/cosmetic, writes nothing to sim, RNG calls identically ordered. Only diff = port muzzle-flash disable + texDebug instrumentation + dyn-overflow guard (behavior-neutral).

Ray-vs-object collision DL walker, ASM 36044-36617 vs C 35471-35789. Divergence in the post-hit texture backward-scan boundary: retail exits the 8-byte-step scan with search==gdlstart and the bnel v0,s3 (36320) then yields texturenum=-1 EVEN when *gdlstart is the G_SETTIMG (loop 36310-36317 re-derived; same in TRI4 path 36557-36580); port helper hit_find_texture_for_triangle_command scans INCLUSIVE of gdlstart (while search>=gdlstart, break only after examining it, C 35452-35480) -> real texture id where retail gives -1, changing bullet-impact material classification for DLs whose texture cmd opens the list. Benign: 0xC0 G_SETTEX direct recognition (port-data counterpart of retail load-time rewrite), continue-past-invalid-0xFD (malformed data only). Dispatch senses, vtx/TRI1/TRI4 index lanes, bbox+intersect ordering, s32-trunc distance, HitThing stores all verified equivalent. See FID-0071.

Door-vertex bbox clamp + texcoord un-squish. Live C NONMATCHING chrobjhandler.c:45918-46052 = ASM chrobjhandler.c:46058-46615. Re-verified anchors: cutoff s16 trunc (trunc.w.s + sll/sra 0x10, ASM 46098) = C:45964; loop bound numVertices/4 signed round-to-zero (+3/bgez) + blez guard (ASM 46113) = C:45984; comparison polarity VERTICAL y>=cutoff (slt $a0,$t5 + bnez skip, ASM 46203) = C:46003, horizontal x<=cutoff (slt $t5,$a1 + bnez skip, ASM 46397) = C:46028. Coord offsets x@0/y@2, sibling order, interp signs match. Reachable (door init 46736, tick 48020, DOORFLAG_0004). Only diff = additive port NULL guards; byte-identical on valid doors.

Endpoint pull-back block: inverted result guard (ASM bnezl result skips block when result!=0 -> runs on result==0/hit, chrobjhandler.c:5660; C 'if(result!=0)' runs on no-hit, :5207) AND wrong base operand (ASM base=($s3)=arg2 :5698; C base=dest=arg1 :5220). Rest of fn verified-equivalent. Retail clamps endpoint to bg_hit-0.1*travel on wall hit; port doesn't. See FID-0065.

[US variant audited] Watch-scene renderer ASM 17756-18273 vs C 17339-17751. Tint written to WRONG FIELD: retail sw to sp+0x1ec = renderdata(sp+0x1b8)+0x34 = envcolour (205 @18203-18205 states 5/12; r<<24|g<<16|b<<8|a from lbu 0xfdc..0xfdf @18207-18217) feeding gDPSetFogColor via PropType-4 material path; C 17677/17679 writes cullmode (+0x3c, inert) with LE-byte-reversed *(u32*)&tileColor -> pause arm loses room tint + raise/lower darkening. Plus guPerspective aspect 0x3FBA2E8C=1.4545455 (17820-17821) vs C 1.456f (JP variant 18341-18342 shows same retail bits). Rest verified equivalent. See FID-0068.

Vehicle ground-alignment matrix build. ASM chrobjhandler.c:8585 = live C 8331 (NATIVE_PORT), traced instruction-by-instruction. Y-rot x scale x pos matrix, transform 4 corner verts (Switches[1..4]), walkTilesBetweenPoints_NoCallback + stanGetPositionYValue per corner (any fail -> valid=0). Fallback (valid==0, beqz :8720): plain Y-rot + stanY-(vert1.y+ymin)*scale (C:8458). Else: 4 normalized edge vecs, pick adjacent-edge cross with max Y (crossNN_y ASM 0x4E58/4E70/4EC4/4EF0 = C:8486-8492; cross12/23/34/41 = C:8495/8507/8514/8521), build orthonormal obj->mtx (up=normal m[1] obj+0x28, fwd r0 m[0] obj+0x18, right=row0xrow1 m[2] obj+0x38), pos.y=pt1.y-ymin*scale-pt2.y (C:8556). Return=valid(0x108). Only diff = additive NATIVE_PORT modelGetSwitchDataSafe null-guards + bbox fallback (behavior-preserving on valid data).

Object pickup/collectability gate + proximity/LOS. ASM chrobjhandler.c:42561 = live C 41972-42251 (NATIVE_PORT). All paths traced-match: collectable/flag gate (type!=0x11 flag 0x100000 else 0x40000, 0x80000 inhibit) = C 41978; weapon type8 throwing{0x1A,0x57}/explosive sets + dual sign test sll flags,3;bgez->right else left = C 42042; magazine type7 lw 0x80 ammoType, curAmmo>=max return0 = C 42066; PROPDEF_AMMO type0x14 (prior ammo-crate hot spot) FAITHFUL: reads slots[i].quantity via lhu 0x82, stride +4, 13 iters, ammotype=i+1 w/ i==1->9mm (bondtypes.h:3395) = corrected C 42086; armour type0x15; proximity vrot<-0.7854 + magnet, far magnet>=60 distSq<=122500|dy|<=500, near <=10000|dy|<=200, dx=0x58-8 etc, LOS stanTestLineUnobstructed tile!=prop->stan reject = C 42126. Only deviation = commented NATIVE_PORT same-room-tagged LOS relaxation (42162), intentional. Maximally reachable (per-pickup tick).

Port omits retail mpmenuon early-out (ammo HUD renders over MP watch menu). ASM has two guards (gunammooff@0x1064 + mpmenuon@0x29c4, gun.c:32351-32356); C checks only gunammooff (gun.c:32056). Reachability confirmed (caller bondview.c:21384 unconditional; caller mpmenuon block only overlays). See FID-0064.

5 divergences re-derived from ASM 38027-38457 vs live C 37425-37667: (D1) retail type-20 destroyed block (randomGetNext%13 + slot scan + ammocrateAllocate salvage magazine spawn, 38215-38326) entirely missing from C switch 37607-37656 (also RNG stream desync); (D2) armour type-21 amount INVERTED (ASM bnezl 38418: destroyed->0.0, else formula; C 37646-37652 backwards); (D3) unarmed non-collectable gate INVERTED (ASM bgezl 38072 proceeds iff flags&0x01000000 CLEAR; C 37467 proceeds iff SET); (D4) armed-path INVINCIBLE 0x20000 early-out (bltzl 38079) dropped -> timer=0/chain-flag side effects on invincible explosives; (D5) type-7/8 non-matching cases return in retail (38102/38128 -> bare epilogue) but fall through to objIsMortal+damage in C. See FID-0074.

[US variant audited] Upper-text HUD window + debug manpos line renderer. ASM 23224-23622 vs C 23057-23215, traced fully: 151-byte stringbuffer stride via sll/addu/sll/subu/sll3/subu chain (23245-23252) = stringbuffer_top[2][0x97]; four early gates bnez/bltz/beqz/bnez all -> debug path (23235-23257) = C 23081-23093 (upper_text_window_timer s32 so bltz==signed <0); cameraBufferToggle two-arm layout incl signed (top+0x20)/11*11-2 (23288-23322) = C 23105-23110; main menus call y-2 vs debug path y2 undecremented + bottom+1 (23331-23338 / 23481-23490 = C 23115/23177, spot-verified); s16 trunc of viGetX via sh/lh delay-slot store (23342/23353) = (s16) cast; all 6 textRender 11-arg stacks matched 1:1; compass trunc-toward-zero *180/pi (late_rodata 0x40490fdb) + (deg+0x16)/45 idx*3 (23381-23464) = C 23137-23170; 5 rodata format strings byte-verified. Benign: 27- vs 30-byte compass table copy (max reachable idx 8 -> byte 26), snprintf bounds, NATIVE_PORT tile NULL guard. No branch-likely hazards; no jump table.

End-credits scroll renderer (Cradle stage 54). ASM 20824-21186 vs live C 20597-20822 (NONMATCHING guard), traced fully: three early-outs stage!=54 / credits_state!=1 (bnel w/ delay lw ra only-when-taken) / credits_pointer NULL (20840-20852) = C 20618-20628, all return original gdl pre-microcode_constructor; signed div-by-16 with +15 negative bias + endrow+1 + startrow<0 clamp (20868-20883) = C 20642-20656; skip-loop with mid-loop i++ in always-executed delay slot (20915-20916) + both-TextId-zero exit setting credits_state=2 (20891-20899) = C 20663-20691 (CreditsEntry stride 0xC); lhu u16 TextId1/2 vs 0x5011, lh s16 Position1/2 bltzl-skip, Alignment via (s16) cast reproducing lh (20889-21068) = C 20672-20723; alignment grouping ==1 right / ==2 center (sra 1) / default left in both text blocks (20997-21016/21099-21118, spot-verified) = C 20733-20742/20779-20788; menus call ypos-1 only on the register copy, textRender gets undecremented ypos, s16 viewheight trunc per block (20972-21086) = C 20726-20773; render-loop entry/exit incl TextId1==0/TextId2!=0 langGet(0) quirk preserved; final combiner_bayer_lod_perspective from all four exits (21167-21170) = C 20818. No jump table; single caller maybe_mp_interface.

Recursive per-prop DL builder (monitor microcode, door cull/env, destroyed fade, portal projection swaps, impact decals, subdraw + child recursion). ASM 32123-32488 vs C 31743-32146: entry flags&2 beql early-out (32157-32161 = C 31785, spot-verified); portal double test w/ field_10E0 re-derive (32166-32174 = C 31797-31802); monitor arg4 selection incl screen-1 0x10000000 vs screen-2 0x30000000 mask difference (32190-32270 = C 31831-31923, spot-verified) and screens 3-4 reusing screen-2 arg4; Switches[0..3] to +0x80/+0xF4/+0x168/+0x1DC stride 0x74; needsAnimation rodata Vertices-vs-rwdata compare via u16 RwDataIndex (32345-32360 = C 32036-32049); destroyed-level double call + cullmode 3/1 stores in non-likely delay slots (32368-32391 = C 32054-32066); alpha x50+0x64 strength-reduced clamp 255 (32392-32409 = C 32070-32078); door pre/post subdraw B6000000/3000 emits + doorFlags&8 (32314-32340/32436-32446 = C 32012-32029/32101-32109); bullet-impact gate lbu obj+2 & 1<<pane (32448-32457 = C 32111); child chain 0x20/0x24 recursion (32476-32488 = C 32126-32132); tail transform count lh +0xE (32491-32506 = C 32134-32146). NATIVE_PORT deviations documented as substrate/guard family: glass portal-projection skip (C 31804-31819, commented native camera-space matrix adaptation — faithful transcription would double-apply the camera basis on native; renderer-surface, pixel-verifiable if ever suspected), G_MTX_FLOAT_PORT marker, modelGetSwitchNodeSafe/monitorFindDrawableNode identity-on-valid-data resolution.

NATIVE_PORT rewrite (C 31196-31242) faithful in GBI plumbing but position/flip math diverges from ASM 31418-31716 while callers pass retail values: y>=0 anchor y-h*0.5 (ASM 31513-31525) vs y; y<0 anchor H+S-(h*0.5-(h>>1)) (31536-31552) vs H+S-h*0.5 (floor(h/2) px shift); retail flipX slot constant 0 (sw zero 0x18 31669, incoming flipX only negates subpixel frac 31502-31505) vs port passes flipX through -> left dual-wield icon mirrored; minor: dropped +/-fracW x term + forced G_TF_POINT. Guard census clean (zero retail early-outs). See FID-0067.

Watch-menu item renderer, ASM 15779-16118 vs C 15578-15790. Divergence: phantom per-frame save/restore of hands[GUNRIGHT].weaponnum_watchmenu (C 15619 + done: 15782-15787 calling 7F05DA8C/7F05DAE4) with no ASM counterpart -- retail sets the item once (single jal 7F05DA8C a0=0 @15829, {30,23}->60 remap 15821-15827) and leaves it pinned between frames (teardown elsewhere); zero jal sub_GAME_7F05DAE4 in any GLOBAL_ASM repo-wide. State-visible: bondview raise/lower model-swap consumers see equipped weapon instead of menu item while browsing. Rest fully equivalent: guard senses/order incl bitflag 0x4000, renderdata template, render_pos-before-modelInit ordering, revolver skeleton compare + slots 4/5, shell loop 18/23+j, lights item set + GBI words + dual 7F078474 calls, alpha>=255 PropType split, f32->s32 loop. See FID-0073.

Object-hit shot handler ASM 39219-39554 vs C 38959-39247. Impact-FX suppression gate on WRONG WEAPON ID: retail li $at,23 + beq on shotdata->weapon (39354-39356) = ITEM_WATCHLASER (enum pos verified, ITEM_TRIGGER=30 anchor); C 39069 gates on ITEM_TASER (31) -> watch laser spawns impact FX + extra randomGetNext (RNG desync); corroborated by chrprop.c:3040 using ITEM_WATCHLASER for the identical construct. Rest verified equivalent (ancestor walk, 26.0f impact math, material table stride-8 hitSound&0xf, door/cctv grouping, damage scaling, bounce flag senses). See FID-0069.

[LEFTOVERDEBUG variant @7F089208] HUD/interface frame renderer, audited first-hand line-by-line vs C 21194-21406. Divergence: retail calls ONLY bondviewGetIfCurrentPlayerHealthShowTime for the health-bar draw gate (jal 21486; target 0FC227AF decodes to 0x7F089EBC, distinct from DamageShowTime 0x7F089EA4; sub_GAME_7F088618 jal 0FC22186 decodes exactly to 0x7F088618 confirming symbol fidelity) + watch_animation_state==0; C 21253 ORs in DamageShowTime (damageshowtime>=0, active during damage flash) -> port draws health/armour bars during damage flashes retail gates behind sub_GAME_7F0C6048, and skips the healthdisplaytime decrement (C 21257-21268 = ASM 21499-21521) in that window. All else equivalent: intro-camera path, mpmenu rect s16 truncs, death/music/missionstate sequence, ClockTimer 1:2 pick, c.le.s field28 gate, kill_counts stride-0x70 loop, scenario!=1||kills<2, joyGetButtons 0xB000, HUD tail order. See FID-0070.

[retail US variant @7F089370] Same structure as the LEFTOVERDEBUG variant, audited first-hand: single HealthShowTime call (jal 21816, word 0FC2281C -> 0x7F08A070 US) + lw 0x1c8 watch gate (21818-21822); no DamageShowTime reference anywhere in the block (regional struct shifts only: mpmenuon 0x29bc vs 0x29c4, healthdisplaytime 0x29f8 vs 0x2a00). C 21253 ORs in DamageShowTime -> same divergence. See FID-0070.

Projectile/prop slide-to-stan resolver. ASM chrobjhandler.c:6101-6418 vs live C 5966-6099, traced fully: early-outs dest==pos.xyz -> 1 and !(runtime_bitflags&0x80) -> 1; heights branch senses (proj flags&0x40 bnezl; destY<posY c.lt.s swap -> height1=max-side/height2=min-side, else 0/1); both stanTestLineUnobstructed calls (a3=destX/newX, 0x10=destZ/newZ, 31, h1,h2, 0,1) + stan!=NULL + stanTestVolume<0 (bgez skip) senses; first success block returns result=1 (0xb0 untouched) w/ pos+runtime_pos update = C 6029-6037; fail path getCollisionEdge(A@sp+0x80,B@sp+0x74), arg3=(B.z-A.z, 0, A.x-B.x) w/ zero->z=1 else guNormalize; delta path chrlvStanLineDirIntersection + calculateNormalizedLineIntersection(linePoint{width,pos.x,pos.z}, A.xz, B.xz, dir{dx,dz}) then newX/Z = pos + dir*intersect*0.99000001 (D_80052A5C) and pos.y=savedY(=destY)/result=0 tail. The arg2-all-equal branch (E7C) is unreachable in both (top equality check already returned); retail reads uninit savedY there vs C 0.0f — dead code both sides.

[US variant] Pickup/interact dispatcher. Retail dispatch = object_interaction_table fn-pointer table idx=type-3, bounds sltiu<0x2d (chrobjhandler.c:40910-40919): idx1=key(type4) idx4=magazine(7) idx5=weapon(8) idx17=ammobox(20) idx18=bodyarmor(21) else default — maps 1:1 onto live C switch (PROPDEF enum verified bondconstants.h:3436). Entry gate bonddead||!g_ClockTimer -> 0 = C 40616. Handlers traced: key sfx 0xE5 + ActivatedText||langGet(0xA43C) -> v1=4; magazine add_ammo(lw 0x80 ammoType, get_ammo_in_magazine, 1, show) -> v1=1; ammobox 13-slot loop lhu 0x82 stride 4 w/ i==1->9mm (AMMO enum verified), getPlayerCount==1 solo multiplier trunc, sfx 0xEA -> v1=1 (= corrected FID-landed loop); weapon: 29->AddInvItem(30), 88->EquipWrapper(0,88), DESTROYED 0x400 branch w/ weaponnum<33 AddWeaponByProp + pass=1 text block -> v1=4, else AddWeaponByProp!=0 pass=1 + ActivatedTextWeapon/else-pass display -> v1=1, ammo tail (type!=0, collected>0, cur<max slt sense, give=cur+collected, (pass==0&&show) display); armour amount lwc1 0x84 + sfx 0x51 + playercount<3 text pick -> v1=1; default sfx 0xE5 + 0xA43F -> v1=4. Tail: v1==1 && !(runtime_bitflags&0x10) -> objFree(obj,0,state@2 &4) return 1(INV_ITEM_WEAPON); v1!=0 -> AddPropToInv return 4(INV_ITEM_PICKUP); else 0 — INV enum verified 3333-3340.

Death-camera position sampler (129 angle-seeds x 16 sectors x 4 scale steps). ASM bondview.c:5458-5761 vs live C 5306-5443, traced fully: RANDOMFRAC = u32 randomGetNext w/ +2^32 bgez correction x 2^-32 (all 3 sites); angle += 0.39269909 w/ >=tau wrap (c.le.s f20,f12); dir=sin/0/cos; candidate = dir*dist + srcPos; per-probe tile=stan(arg5@0xf0) + 7F03D058(prop,0/1) bracket around stanTestLineUnobstructed(&tile, target.xz, cand.xz, 19, 0,1,0,1); lineResult==0 -> chrlvStanPointPointIntersection + sqrt recompute of distance; distance-=radius then distance<minDist(0xf4) continue sense (c.le.s minDist,dist bc1fl); rangeDiff=dist-minDist; randDist=(frac*rangeDiff)*scale+minDist; bss pos = dir*randDist+src; line test again + stanTestVolume(&tile,bss.xz,radius,31,0,1) bgez reject; y = frac*(185-radius)+(floorY+radius); yDiff<=-1000 reject (c.lt.s -1000,yDiff bc1f), yDiff<1000 -> found=1; scale-=0.25 loop while 0<scale && !found; counters fp<16 / outer<0x81 both w/ found exits; collision_radius reloaded from player+0x4b0 per outer iter (loop-invariant, C hoists — equivalent). Return found; found path skips further RNG identically both sides.

Projectile release/spin setup. Fully traced ASM chrobjhandler.c:6750-7048 vs C 6573-6733: ~0x10000 clear + 0x80 gate, type==1 projectileFree, ownerprop@0x88=NULL + flags &~1 &~4, matrix/quat chain (get_rot -> set_rot(mtx1@0xcc) -> quat(unk68) -> inverse(mtx2@0x8c) -> multiply(mtx3@0x4c)), unkC0/C4/C8 row magnitudes (outer-add commutative swaps only, IEEE-exact), dirX/dirZ zero-branch + normalize, mtx2 rows incl 0<=m11 sign branch, quat(unk78) + ensure_shortest_path, dot(m2 row0 . m1 row0), both 0.05/(theta*4/tau) gate chains w/ senses verified, theta==0 -> unk64=1.0, |.|/clamp [0.03,0.15] tail. ONE divergence: acos-operand sum association a+(b+c) vs C (a+b)+c -> FID-0078.

[US/JP block] Tank-shell / chrrocket spawn. ASM gun.c:5513-5815 vs live C 5382-5509, traced fully: hand stride 0x3A8 -> player+0x870; weapon==32 (ITEM_TANKSHELLS) branch w/ tank flags&2 (byte@1) dual check — bondviewSet3dCoord7F07CEB0 vs 7F068190+RotateVec; velocity = dir*66.666664 (+ (pos-prev)/delta when g_ClockTimer>0, register pairs re-verified pos-minus-prev in BOTH branches); tank position = model->render_pos[4].pos.m[3][x/y/z] (+0x130/134/138) + TransformVec, else player pos; setSixExplosionAndSmokeEntries. Else branch: bullet_path_from_screen_center(origin,dir,hand), pos=hand->field_B58(+0x2e8), base=dir*1.111111, vel=base*delta (+ pos-prev correction).
